title: rubus hirtus var. bayeri
intro: Rubus hirtus var. bayeri, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to the Himalayan region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. bayeri include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
